name: Recommended Blocked Process is Running
notes:
This rule triggers when a recommended block process is running in the system. 

Microsoft Windows lists recommended block rules to disable application that can potentially be exploited by an attacker and also bypass Windows Defender Application Control. 

Note: Reference set Recommended Blocked Processes is pre-populated with Microsoft commonly exploited applications. Tune the reference set with any Endpoint process to fit business needs.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when any of Process Name (custom), Parent Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) Recommended Blocked Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Recommended Blocked Process is Running on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when any of Process Name (custom), Parent Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) Recommended Blocked Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Recommended Blocked Process Running
Event description: Detects when a process recommended by Microsoft to block is running on the system.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
